hero.defaultTag: Viaja Agencia — Where Every Trip Begins
hero.defaultSubtitle: Enjoy Unforgettable Adventures: Discover Your World with Viaja Agencia... Where Every Trip Begins

whyChooseUs.defaultHeading: Your Trip in the Best Hands
whyChooseUs.defaultDescription: We are the agency with over 20 years of experience, IATA certified, adapting to your style and budget
whyChooseUs.pillar1Desc: Explore the world affordably with Viaja Agencia. From budget-friendly options to exclusive deals, we make your travel dreams come true.
whyChooseUs.pillar2Desc: With Viaja Agencia, the world is yours. Choose from our destinations where you'll find an unforgettable experience in every corner of the planet.
whyChooseUs.pillar3Title: Exceptional Service, Every Step of the Way
whyChooseUs.pillar3Desc: At Viaja Agencia, our specialized team provides professional service from start to finish. From personal recommendations to 24/7 support, we ensure your trip is a positive, stress-free experience.
whyChooseUs.pillar4Desc: Trust Viaja Agencia's experts to create your perfect itinerary. With our destination and season specialists, we'll turn your dream trip into reality, tailored especially for you.

newsletter.defaultDescription: Subscribe to our newsletter and be the first to learn about exclusive promotions, seasonal destinations, and the latest news from Viaja Agencia.
newsletter.successMessage: Thank you! We'll keep you informed.
newsletter.disclaimer: No spam. You can unsubscribe at any time.

instagram.defaultDescription: Get inspired by amazing destinations, travel tips, and the best deals. Join our travel community.
instagram.post2: Santorini at sunset, a dream come true
instagram.post3: Japan: where tradition meets the future
instagram.post4: Paris is always a good idea
instagram.post6: Magical Morocco: colors, aromas and adventure
instagram.post7: Romantic Italy, every corner is a postcard
instagram.post8: Safari in Africa: the adventure of a lifetime

pageDestinos.metaDescription: Explore our destinations around the world. Europe, Asia, Africa, the Americas and more — find your next adventure with Viaja Agencia.
pageDestinos.heroAlt: Aerial view of a tropical island surrounded by turquoise waters
pageDestinos.intro: 12 world regions await you. Each destination is a gateway to unique experiences, fascinating cultures, and unforgettable landscapes.
pageDestinos.ctaDescription: Our advisors can create a personalized itinerary to any corner of the world. Tell us your dream and we'll make it happen.

pagePaquetes.metaDescription: Discover our exclusive travel packages. Irresistible offers to the most incredible destinations in the world.
pagePaquetes.heroDescription: Packages designed with attention to detail so you only worry about enjoying. Flights, hotels, tours, and experiences — all included.
pagePaquetes.heroAlt: Crystal-clear lake surrounded by green mountains at sunrise
pagePaquetes.megatravelDescription: Discover the most attractive deals of the moment on domestic and international destinations through Megatravel.
pagePaquetes.ctaDescription: We create packages tailored to your needs. Tell us about your dream trip and our advisors will design the perfect experience for you.

pageGrupos.metaDescription: Plan your group trip with Viaja Agencia. Families, friends, companies — we handle all logistics so you just enjoy.
pageGrupos.heroAlt: Group of friends celebrating at sunset on a beach
pageGrupos.heroDescription: Share the experience of discovering the world with those you love most. We organize everything so your group lives unforgettable moments.
pageGrupos.benefit1Desc: Preferential rates and exclusive volume discounts you won't find traveling on your own.
pageGrupos.benefit2Desc: We take care of flights, hotels, transfers, tours and everything you need. You just enjoy.
pageGrupos.benefit3Desc: We design the perfect itinerary adapted to the interests and pace of the group.
pageGrupos.benefit4Desc: Exclusive group activities: private dinners, personalized tours and unforgettable moments.
pageGrupos.tripsDescription: Join one of our confirmed groups or request a personalized departure for your group.
pageGrupos.ctaAlt: Group of travelers exploring a historic city
pageGrupos.ctaHeading: Do you have a group ready to travel?
pageGrupos.ctaDescription: Get a no-obligation quote. We'll design an itinerary tailored to your group, no matter the size.

pageEventos.metaDescription: Destination weddings, honeymoons, anniversaries, and corporate trips. We make every event an extraordinary experience.
pageEventos.heroAlt: Elegant outdoor celebration with decorative lights at sunset
pageEventos.heroDescription: Every celebration deserves a setting to match. We turn your most important events into unforgettable travel experiences.
pageEventos.event1Desc: Celebrate your love in the most romantic settings in the world. We organize every detail — from the oceanfront ceremony to the dream reception. Coordination with local vendors, legal permits, and complete logistics for your guests.
pageEventos.event2Desc: Start your new life together with an unforgettable trip. Exclusive destinations, adults-only hotels, private romantic dinners, and experiences designed for couples. From the Maldives to Tuscany — your perfect honeymoon awaits.
pageEventos.event3Desc: Celebrate years of love with a trip that reconnects you. Whether it's a weekend getaway or a European tour, we design experiences tailored to your story. Surprises, upgrades, and magical moments included.
pageEventos.event4Desc: Incentive trips, conventions, and team-building that inspire. We handle complete logistics for corporate groups — flights, accommodation, meeting rooms, activities, and transportation. Measurable results for your organization.
pageEventos.megatravelDescription: Explore the events and special packages we've prepared for you through our partner Megatravel.
pageEventos.ctaAlt: Couple celebrating in a paradise destination
pageEventos.ctaDescription: Tell us your vision and our specialized team will create a personalized proposal for your celebration.

pageNosotros.metaDescription: Learn about our 20+ year history creating unforgettable travel experiences from León, Guanajuato. We are Viaja Agencia.
pageNosotros.heroAlt: Couple contemplating a golden sunset on the horizon
pageNosotros.heroDescription: Over 20 years turning travel dreams into reality from the heart of Bajío.
pageNosotros.storyParagraph1: Viaja Agencia was born in {city} with the vision of bringing the world closer to families in the Bajío region. From our beginnings, we committed to offering personalized, first-class service.
pageNosotros.storyParagraph2End: in the tourism sector, we've guided thousands of travelers toward unforgettable experiences on five continents. Our team of specialized advisors knows firsthand every destination we recommend.
pageNosotros.storyParagraph3: Today we are a consolidated travel agency, backed by international certifications like IATA, and recognized for our service excellence in the region.
pageNosotros.storyImageAlt: Professional team working in a modern office
pageNosotros.value1Desc: Over two decades backing every trip with transparency, honesty, and the commitment to always deliver on our promises.
pageNosotros.value2Desc: IATA certified and recognized by the best international providers. We only work with the best for you.
pageNosotros.value3Desc: Every traveler is unique. We design experiences tailored to your tastes, interests, and budget.
pageNosotros.value4Desc: We accompany you before, during, and after your trip. 24/7 support so you enjoy without worries.
pageNosotros.ctaDescription: Let us create the perfect travel experience for you. Our team is ready to assist you.

pageContacto.metaDescription: Contact us to plan your next trip. We are in León, Guanajuato.
pageContacto.heroAlt: Luxury hotel reception with elegant décor
pageContacto.heroDescription: We're ready to create the perfect travel experience for you. Write to us and an advisor will assist you right away.
pageContacto.legalName: Grupo Turístico del Centro-Occidente, S.A. de C.V.
pageContacto.defaultAddress: Nube #522, Col. Jardines del Moral, C.P. 37160, León, Gto., Mexico
pageContacto.defaultSchedule: Mon — Fri: 9:00 AM — 7:00 PM · Sat: 10:00 AM — 2:00 PM
pageContacto.successMessage: Thank you for contacting us. One of our advisors will get back to you within 24 hours.
pageContacto.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll respond as soon as possible.
pageContacto.placeholderMessage: Tell us about the trip you dream of...
pageContacto.mapTitle: Viaja Agencia location on Google Maps

pageHoteles.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in the world with Viaja Agencia.
pageHoteles.heroDescription: We compare the best accommodation options so you find the perfect place for your next destination.

pageTours.metaDescription: Discover tours and excursions in the most fascinating destinations in the world.
pageTours.heroDescription: Discover activities, adventures, and cultural experiences guided by local experts in the most fascinating destinations in the world.
pageTours.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or category.

pageAutos.metaDescription: Rent cars at any destination in the world with Viaja Agencia.
pageAutos.heroDescription: Find the perfect vehicle for your trip. From economy to luxury cars, with the best rates and full coverage.
pageAutos.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or category.
